resources.string: Seems like we can not reach CoinDepo. Check your internet connection and try again.
Seems like something went wrong. Please try again later.
Wrong email or password. Please try again
To secure your CoinDepo account, please complete verification by entering the code received on %1$s
Email Verification Code is invalid. Please try again
Limit of incorrectly entered Email Verification Codes is reached. Please try again in 10 minutes
To secure your CoinDepo account, please complete verification by entering your 2FA code.
2FA Verification Code is invalid. Please try again
If you haven't received the code,
CoinDepo sent a code to your email. If you do not see our message in the INBOX folder after several attempts, please try:\n

1. Check the SPAM folder in your email. Messages could be considered as spam in rare cases.

2. Please ensure your email address is %1$s

3. Click "Resend code" after 30 seconds. If you still have not received the code, please contact our Support Team at support@coindepo.com
Enter your registered email address and we will send you instructions to reset your password.
Please enter a valid email address
If you do not see our message in the INBOX folder, please check the SPAM folder in your email
Messages could end up there in rare cases.
Seems like you are trying to recover your password too frequently. Try again later.

The Portfolio Balance represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of all assets in your Interest Accounts and is for informational purposes only. Actual account balances are denominated in stablecoins and cryptocurrencies.

The amount available for withdrawal may differ from the Portfolio Balance in three cases: 
1) You have already initiated a withdrawal from one or more of your Interest Accounts and it is in the "Pending" status. Until processing is completed, this amount is included in the Portfolio Balance; and/or
2) The Portfolio Balance includes bonuses that are not available for withdrawal during a certain period, based on the terms of the promotion under which they were received; and/or 
3) Part of the Portfolio Balance is not available for withdrawal, as it is used as collateral to maintain the level of 50% LTV (Loan-to-Value) ratio for loans you have already received, along with accrued interest for using the loan.

Total Interest Paid represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of all interest payments that have been made to your Interest Accounts to date. The USD/EUR/GBP value is for informational purposes only. As you may be earning interest in various assets, actual account balances are denominated in stablecoins and cryptocurrencies.

Total Interest Accrued represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of all expected interest payments to your accounts on the next Payout Dates. Actual interest payments are made in stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, so the USD/EUR/GBP value may differ based on the exchange rate on the Payout Date.
The Token Portfolio Balance represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of all tokens in your Rewards Accounts and is for informational purposes only. Actual account balances are denominated in tokens.

The amount available for withdrawal may differ from the Token Portfolio Balance in two cases:\n1) Part of the Token Portfolio Balance is not available for withdrawal, as it is locked for a certain period, based on the conditions of the Private Sale/Pre-sale/Promotion/Airdrop of tokens; and/or\n2) You have already initiated a withdrawal of tokens from one or more of your Rewards Accounts and it is in the "Pending" status. Until processing is completed, this amount is included in the Token Portfolio Balance."

Total Rewards Paid represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of all interest rewards payments that have been made to your Rewards Accounts to date. The USD/EUR/GBP value is for informational purposes only. As you may be earning rewards in various tokens, actual account balances are denominated in these tokens.

Total Rewards Accrued represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of all expected interest rewards payments to your accounts on the next Payout Dates. Actual rewards payments are made in tokens, so the USD/EUR/GBP value may differ based on the exchange rate on the Payout Date.

Your Credit Line Limit is always 50% of the current value of your Available Portfolio Balance (Portfolio Balance minus the sum of all withdrawals in "Pending" status). You can receive loans in stablecoins or cryptocurrency to your Current Interest Account at any time within the Available Credit Limit. Transferring your assets to a collateral account is not required to obtain a loan. You will continue to earn interest as all of your assets will remain in Interest Accounts.

Your Available Credit Limit is the difference between your Credit Line Limit and the amount of your Current Loans. At the moment, you can get an instant loan in stablecoins or cryptocurrency for an amount not exceeding the Available Credit Limit.
Interest Paid represents the amount of all interest payments that have been made to your account to date. The displayed current value in USD/EUR/GBP is for informational purposes only.
*Once you deposit funds to your Current Interest Account, you can instantly transfer them to any of your %1$s Interest Accounts using the
WARNING! Please enter both Deposit Address and Tag/MEMO, which are required to deposit %1$s to your CoinDepo account successfully.
Send only %1$s to this deposit address using the %2$s network.
Sending other asset to this address may result in the total loss of your funds.
Are you sure you want to close this Interest Account?

You can perform this action only with a zero account balance.

Please, first withdraw all funds from the Interest Account you want to close using the "Withdraw" or "Transfer Between Accounts" function.

After that, the Interest Account will be automatically closed.

Accrued Interest represents the amount of the expected interest payment to your account on the next Interest Payout Date below at 14:00 UTC. The displayed current value in USD/EUR/GBP is for informational purposes only.

This is the next date the Accrued Interest is paid to the account. When the specified date comes, at 14:00 UTC, the Accrued Interest is credited to the account, and the date is automatically changed to the next one. The Account Balance is increased by the amount of the interest paid. The Accrued Interest amount in the next compounding period also increases, as it is calculated based on the updated Account Balance.
Compound interest is paid out every %1$s days
Compound interest is paid out every %1$s days
Haven\'t received code? Request new code in %1$d seconds. The code will expire after 30 minutes.

The Token Portfolio Balance represents the current USD/EUR/GBP value of COINDEPO tokens in your Interest Accounts and is for informational purposes only. Actual account balances are denominated in COINDEPO tokens.
The COINDEPO Token Amount is the current balance of COINDEPO tokens deposited in Compound Interest Accounts.
Your Current Tier in the COINDEPO Token Advantage Program is calculated, assigned, and subject to change based on the value of the COINDEPO token share in your crypto portfolio on the platform.

Token Share in Portfolio is the percentage of your CoinDepo portfolio value that is held in COINDEPO tokens. The portfolio value is regularly recalculated based on the market price of the digital assets included in it.
Failed while trying to cancel transaction. Try again later.

This withdrawal request is currently in progress. While the withdrawal is in the "Pending" status you can cancel it.

You will receive an email notification when the cancellation process is completed. This withdrawal will be displayed on the "Transactions" page as "Canceled".

Are you sure you want to cancel this withdrawal?
Failed to transfer funds. Check your internet connection and try again.
The amount must be at least %1$s %2$s

The amount available for transfer may differ from the account balance if you have already made a partial withdrawal of funds from this account and it is in the \"Pending\" status. Until the processing is completed, this amount is displayed on the account balance.
WARNING! When transferring from Current Interest Account

Please note that you can transfer funds from your Current Interest Account to your other Interest Accounts in two cases only:
1) When the Payout Date of the Interest Account you are transferring funds to, is matching with the transfer date. For example, if today is 10th March and the Payout Date of the Weekly Interest Account is 10th March.
2) When the start date of the compounding period is matching with the transfer date. For example, if you opened a Weekly Account on 10th March and today is 17th March, the next Payout Interest Date is 24th March. Today's date is considered as start date and you can transfer funds to this account.
If on the date of transfer, you do not have any Interest Accounts available for transfer, you can instantly open a new account with any compounding period using the function "Add New Account".
This limitation allows you to avoid misuse of your funds because if you fund your account before the end of the compounding period, Accrued Interest will be recalculated after the Payout Date.
WARNING! When transferring to Current Interest Account

You can transfer your asset from any Interest Account to the Current Interest Account at any time.
For example, if you open a Weekly Interest Account on 10th March and fund it with 10,000 USDT, on 17th March at 14:00 UTC you will receive Accrued Interest based on Account Balance of 10,000 USDT.
In another case, if during the compounding period, you transfer 2,000 USDT from the Weekly Account before the Interest Payout Date, the Accrued Interest will be recalculated. The Payout Date will not be changed and will remain as 17th March but Accrued Interest for the entire compounding period will be based on the Account Balance of 8,000 USDT.
Please note that if you choose to transfer funds to the Current Interest Account in full on the Payout Date but before 14:00 UTC, you will lose the Accrued Interest. On the Payout Date, transfer funds in full only after 14:00 UTC once the Accrued Interest has been added to your Account Balance. If the Account Balance after the transfer to the Current Account becomes zero, then this account is automatically closed.
*All withdrawals are subjected to a one business day security hold and will be processed no later than 19:00 UTC on the next business day.
WARNING! Please confirm if the Withdrawal Address requires a Destination Tag.
The daily withdrawal limit depends on your verification level. Once your identity verification is complete, you have no withdrawal limit.
CoinDepo does not charge any withdrawal fees.
Network Fee is required to confirm your transaction by the mining network and fluctuates depending on the network or volume of transactions.
The amount received may vary slightly, depending on network fees at the time the transaction is processed on the network.
Please ensure that the %1$s Withdrawal Address is correct. CoinDepo is not responsible for any assets sent to the wrong address.

Please note that if you withdraw funds in full from any Interest Account other than the Current Account on the Payout Date but before 14:00 UTC, you will lose the Accrued Interest. On the Payout Date, withdraw funds in full only after 14:00 UTC once the Accrued Interest has been added to your Account Balance. After the full withdrawal of funds, the Interest Account (except for the Current Account) is automatically closed.
Fee estimation failed. Check your internet connection and try again.
Withdraw request failed. Check your internet connection and try again.
